name: Chicken Curry with Apples
recipeInstructions:
NOTE: Sprinkle the apples with 2 tablespoons of lemon juice...it will keep them from discoloring.
1. Heat oil in a wok/skillet and add chicken. Stir-fry until cooked (about 3-5 minutes). If easier, cook in halves.
2. Add green pepper and celery; stir-fry for another few minutes.
3. Add apples and heat until warm.
4. Stir in yogurt and spices. Heat until everything is hot.
5. Serve over rice with more apples, bananas, raisins, peanuts, grapes, chutney, sesame seeds, or whatever else strikes your fancy. This is a fairly mild, sweet curry.
